title: Build Command Center UI from prototype
description: Use the prototype materials in /home/home/Projects/AI Command Center/Command Center UI/AI command center UI to build a usable AI Command Center UI through MAP-managed ownership, review, and durable artifacts. Source materials include Command Center.dc.html, Command Center - Studio.dc.html, support.js, and uploads/.
output_paths: /home/home/Projects/AI Command Center/Command Center UI/AI command center UI
acceptance_criteria: Requirements are extracted from the existing .dc.html mockups and recorded durably
A runnable Command Center UI implementation is created or updated from the prototype direction
Implementation follows MAP ownership and records progress in events/handoffs/artifacts
Claude reviews before TASK-055 is marked done or anything is published
User can launch or open the resulting UI locally
